llm_operation.reason: tf.signal.overlap_and_add and paddle.nn.functional.fold serve fundamentally different purposes: the former reconstructs 1D signals from overlapping frames, while the latter is a 2D col2im-like operation for image patches; parameter semantics (e.g., output_size, kernel_size) are not cross-framework compatible.
